rulings.Case Title: BAY RIDGE PROPERTIES LLC VS. AMERICAN BROKERS CONDUIT CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION On Its First Cause Of Action Against Bay Ridge Properties, Llc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 24, 2017, line 1. INTERVENOR WELLS FARGO, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION On Its First Cause Of Action Against Bay Ridge Properties, Llc Continued to August 23, 2017. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than August 4, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CK)

rulings.Case Title: STEVE RYAN VS. MITCHELL ROSENFELD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 24, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT MICHAEL SORANTINO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to August 14, 2017. Plaintiff shall file and serve opposition no later than August 2, 2017. Defendant shall file and serve reply, if any, no later than August 9, 2017. = (501/CK)
